# Pull Request Template

## Description

Please include a summary of the changes you have made for the COMP2156 Group Assignment.  
Include what files you updated/added and the purpose of the changes.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Added new file(s)
- [ ] Updated existing file(s)
- [ ] Fixed issue/typo
- [ ] Other (please explain):

## Checklist

- [ ] My code/files follow the instructions of the COMP2156 Group Assignment
- [ ] I have made at least 10 commits in my branch
- [ ] My branch is based on the latest main branch
- [ ] I have created a separate branch for my work (format: `StudentID-Name`)
- [ ] I have added the required 3 files: `StudentID_gb.txt`, `StudentID_devops.txt`, `StudentID_sdlc.txt`
